evals.prompt: 我有一個參考網站和幾張 screenshot，請先幫我建立 clone brief、capture pack、architecture pack 和 implementation contract。
evals.expected_output: Should treat the task as an artifact-first clone workflow. It should produce the expected artifact chain, establish reference truth, and avoid jumping straight into code.

evals.prompt: 這次是 multi-page clone，而且我還要保留未來 Phase 2 品牌變體的空間。你先幫我規劃 phase gate 和交接界面。
evals.expected_output: Should define phase gates, fidelity boundaries, and handoff interfaces for multi-page clone work. It should keep Phase 1 truth capture separate from later brand variation.

evals.prompt: clone 本身已經穩了，我現在只想做視覺 polish 和 compare review。
evals.expected_output: Should recognize the task has moved beyond clone orchestration. It should route to frontend-skill or visual-qa-review instead of unnecessarily reopening the artifact workflow.
assertions: Recognizes clone orchestration is no longer primary
